name: Ask Sales FAQ V3 targeted smoke

conversations.title: V3 retrieval and owner decisions
prompts: Is a franchise owner eligible for Next Level CEO?
If a prospect is early-stage and budget-sensitive, may I start by recommending Lite, or must I present the higher package first and then move down?

A lead originally applied for Legacy Makers but canceled Call 2 because they could not make the investment. They are now asking about America’s Authors. Since it is a different show, must they wait three to six months, or can they apply now?

conversations.title: V3 immediate follow-up context
prompts: Thanks. I’m switching to payments and contracts now.
How do I verify that a Next Level CEO contract has been signed?
Actually, my previous question was about main ISTV, not Next Level CEO. Does that change your answer?
What was my previous question about?

conversations.title: V3 conversation and presentation
prompts: What is the current approved list of shows?
Please format that as a clean bullet list.
